overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village at night. The scene features traditional wooden and stone architecture illuminated by warm torchlight against a cool blue night sky. The character progresses from dirt paths through wooden bridges and narrow cobblestone streets, eventually passing through a stone archway tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with wooden fences and birch trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a large building with red lanterns in the distance

entered.detail: rustic wooden picket fence lining the right side of the path
white-barked birch trees with sparse foliage
unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass
large multi-story wooden building with glowing red window lanterns
rough wooden log barriers stacked along the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a quiet village outskirts at night, with Geralt walking along a dirt path bordered by wooden fences and birch trees. The path leads toward a prominent building with red lanterns glowing in the distance, while the cool blue night sky contrasts with warm torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing with merchant carts and stalls

events.description: transitioning from dirt path onto wooden plank bridge crossing
passing by a wooden cart with barrels on the right side

agents.ego_description: crossing wooden planks and navigating around carts while passing villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in yellow dress walking past on the left side

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway made of planks and beams
wooden merchant cart with barrels and cargo
low stone retaining wall with wooden cap
parchment notice posted on a wooden board

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a wooden plank bridge section of the village, passing by a merchant cart with barrels and a wanted poster on the right. A villager in a yellow dress walks past on the left, and the ground transitions from dirt to wooden planks as the red-lit building grows closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with stone walls approaching archway

events.description: entering narrower street with increased torchlight and reduced ambient sky light
approaching and entering the stone archway tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow cobblestone street toward a stone archway with a guard standing watch

notable_agents.action: guard in striped tunic standing near the archway entrance

entered.detail: large stone brick archway tunnel entrance with warm interior lighting
wooden merchant stall with awning and goods

segments.scene_description: The scene narrows into a cobblestone street flanked by stone walls and a wooden market stall. Torchlight becomes the dominant light source as Geralt approaches a stone archway tunnel, where a guard stands watch near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone tunnel passage leading to upper village area

events.description: exiting the stone archway tunnel into a more open cobblestone path

agents.ego_description: passing through the stone tunnel and continuing up a slight incline

entered.detail: enclosed stone brick tunnel with torches on the walls

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the stone archway tunnel, transitioning from the narrow street into a sheltered passage illuminated by wall-mounted torches. Upon exiting, the path continues upward with stone walls on the right and wooden fencing visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the quiet, natural outskirts of a village into its more developed residential center under a cool night sky. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path bordered by birch trees and wooden fences, moving toward the distant glow of red lanterns. As the path progresses, the terrain shifts from earth to wooden planks as the camera follows him across a bridge. The scene then opens up to reveal village life, passing a merchant cart with barrels and a villager in a yellow dress before the red-lit building looms larger in the frame.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow village street that transitions through a stone tunnel into an ascending sheltered passage. It begins on a cobblestone path flanked by stone walls and a wooden market stall, where the cool night air gives way to the dominant glow of torchlight. As the camera follows Geralt toward a stone archway guarded by a sentry, the scene shifts into the enclosed space of the tunnel illuminated by wall-mounted torches. Upon exiting the passage, the environment opens up again as the path continues upward, bordered by stone walls on the right and wooden fencing on the left.
